headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 21, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox edged the Detroit Tigers 8-6, securing their win. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians, securing a 9-2 victory, led by Isaac Paredes' 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, led by a strong performance from Rhett Lowder and Sal Stewart's 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

Several key players have been affected by injuries. Raisel Iglesias, a right-handed pitcher for the Atlanta Braves, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026. Edwin Díaz, a right-handed pitcher for the Los Angeles Dodgers, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies. Other injured players include Miles Mastrobuoni, Brendan Donovan, Jonathan India, Michael Grove, Mason Englert, and Cristian Javier.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The New York Yankees acquired RHP Wilmy Sanchez from the Houston Astros in exchange for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations and international bonus pool money.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall Short in Boston**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox edged the Detroit Tigers 8-6, securing their win. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Blast Past Guardians 9-2**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians, securing a 9-2 victory. Isaac Paredes led the Astros' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Reds Take Down Rays 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, led by a strong performance from Rhett Lowder. Sal Stewart led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 3-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, with the Marlins securing the win. Agustín Ramírez led the Cardinals' offense with a home run, 1 RBI, and 1 hit in 4 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Braves RHP Raisel Iglesias Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Atlanta Braves right-handed pitcher Raisel Iglesias has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Yankees Acquire Wilmy Sanchez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees have acquired RHP Wilmy Sanchez from the Houston Astros in exchange for SS Braden Shewmake. The trade was completed on April 19, 2026.
